characters.description: Ada Lovelacewas ahumantechnical expert. Ada Lovelace's mind was one used in the creation of theElma Hendricksonhologram.

characters.name: Aegis Vanguard
characters.description: Aegis Vanguardis anAutobotwho appears inTransformers: Online. He is a friendly giant who helps his comrades perform tasks on the battlefield by using his immense physical frame to cover for them. Despite being a seasoned veteran, his personality is still one of modesty and kindness. TheGreat Waris not a place for such a gentle soul, but Aegis Vanguard has little choice in the matter.

characters.name: Aerialbots TFP
characters.description: Template:Infobox combinerTheAerialbotsare the few flight-capableTransformersloyal to theAutobotsrather than theDecepticons. Although they're an eccentric group, they provide invaluable air support for their ground-bound comrades. The Aerialbots underSilverbolt'scommand are capable of combining intoSuperion. The Seekers were generally Decepticon-leaning neutrals following Starscream's lead, until Shockwave bombed Vos. Though a good portion of the main Seeker forces still followed Starscream into the Decepticons, the survivors of the Vos massacre felt betrayed and joined the Autobots instead, becoming the Aerialbots and patrolling Iacon and Kalis. Jetfire was a Decepticon who defected to the Autobots and mostly worked in a laboratory to improve their flight capabilities. He led the Aerialbots to gather every spaceworthy craft to distract Trypticon while theArkwas built. Exodus Silverbolt was present as part of Prime's command crew after theArkfled Cybertron through the space bridge. He was, apparently, the only flier present, and his ability was treated as a unique virtue. What happened to all the other Aerialbots that were under his command on Cybertron is unclear...

characters.description: Template:NoVisuals Afterburneris a member of a rivalDecepticonfaction of theCybercomrade Sect. WhileStrongarmwas disguised asRetrofitin an attempt to captureClipshade, Clipshade tested her by suggesting that they should find Afterburner and obtain his help. When Strongarm agreed, Clipshade knew she wasn't really a member of his sect.

characters.description: Aimless(エイムレスEimuresu) uses his drill mode to help bigger bots put big holes in each other. He's part of a group ofMini-Consknown as theArms Microns, due to their melee-weapon alternate modes.

characters.name: Airachnid (One)
characters.description: Airachnid (One)Airachnid (One)Real WorldMoviesTransformers OneJapanese VoicesRyōka YuzukiEnglish VoicesVanessa LiguoriProfileSpeciesCybertronianAlternate ModesDroneGenderFemaleEye ColorPurpleStatusUnknownAffiliationSentinel prime's lieutenantAirachnidis the secondary antagonist of the 2024 animated filmTransformers One. She isSentinel Prime's primary lieutenant and covert-surveillance specialist. Transformers One Ryōka Yuzuki Airachnid is a cruel, cold-hearted, sadistic and violent enforcer who is only concerned with maintaining Sentinel Prime’s corrupt rule over Iacon City. She will punish those who step too far out of line when ordered to and never leaves Sentinel Prime’s side unless she is dispatched to kill. She is more than happy to kill outright anyone who gets in her way once she is let loose. She also appears to have no sense of humor, which can leave her in rather awkward positions; such as forcing herself to laugh with Sentinel Prime during his conversation with Orion Pax and D-16, when the latter feared demotion. Despite it all, she appears to be somewhat loyal towards Sentinel Prime and doesn't retreat once the miner cavalry arrive to fight off the Death Trackers, she even specifically orders the soldiers to prioritize protecting Sentinel Prime from the four heroes. Unfortunately, such loyalty isn't completely without bounds; as she did little to defend Sentinel Prime from the Quintesson High Commander's threats, although it's possible that Quintessons are stronger than her.

characters.name: Airachnid TFP
characters.description: Airachnid TFPBasic InformationAlias(es)SpiderbotRogue 'Con (byBreakdown)"Ugly" (bySmokescreen)SpiderSpeciesInsecticon(previously)(previouslyCybertronian, Terrocon(currently)GenderFemaleRankAssassinSecond in Command (formerly)Insecticon QueenStatusUnknown(TerrorconVampire)AffiliationDecepticons(Formerly)InsecticonsEnemiesOptimus PrimeArceeJack DarbyJune DarbyBreakdownSoundwaveStarscreamBulkheadPhysical DescriptionPrimary ColorDark MagentaSecondary ColorDark GreyTertiary ColorDark YellowEye ColorPurpleHeight18 ft (5.5 meters)EquipmentAirachnid's ShipThe Harbinger(Formerly)Web/laser handsSpider legsImmobilizerInsecticonsProduction DetailsFirst appearancePredatoryLast appearanceThirstVoiced byGina Torres  Airachnidis a rogueCybertroniantorture expert andalien collector. She used to be with the Decepticons, where her cruel, cold-sparked, murderous demeanor served her well. After the Great Exodus ofCybertron, however, she decided to go solo. These days. she spends her time engaging in her new hobby: collecting endangered species. when she does, she takes... "souvenirs" — theheads of the species she encounters, which she keeps in specimen jars on hership. She has quite a history withArceefrom back in theGreat War. A sadist in the purest sense of the word, Airachnid takes sick and twisted pleasure and enjoyment out of inflicting pain upon others; whether it's physical, mental, or emotional. Having studied and practiced the arts of torture to horrifying degrees, she is able to measure one's strength of will by how much they resist the agony she inflicts upon them. She can use others' weaknesses against them. A 'con of sport, Airachnid enjoys hunting (mostly sentient beings), as well as collecting endangered species (and if they're not endangered, she'll make it so). She likes to toy with her victims, prolonging their suffering for as long as possible. A vengeful and conspiring woman, Airachnid will always settle scores, as she tried to against Jack when she ominously attempted and failed to kill his mother in front of him, making him watch while she takes his family apart "the sweetest revenge [she] can possibly devise", as retaliation for Jack destroying her ship. An opportunist, she acts on anything that would benefit herself, such as when she tried to steal the polarity gauntlet, and thought that delivering the Immobilizer would allow her to worm into Megatron's favor. She has no problems backstabbing her fellow 'Cons, as she tried to take command in Megatron's absence and didn't think anything of abandoning Starscream. And she even killed Breakdown as a sign of malice towards her former comrades. Her thirst for revenge runs deep as well as he tried to have Megatron erminated twice with her Insecticons. Breakdown was the only one who had a crush on Airachnid. Sadly Airachnid had no clue of his affections and killed him before Breakdown had the chance to end her himself. She can also be flirtatious.

characters.name: Airazor (Prime)
characters.description: Airazoris anAutobot.

characters.name: Airazor (Prime)
characters.description: Airazoris anAutobot.

characters.name: Airazor
characters.description: AirazorAirazorReal WorldMoviesTransformers: Rise of the BeastsEnglish VoicesMichelle YeohProfileSpeciesCybertronianAlternate ModesFalconGenderFemaleEye ColorYellowDied1994StatusDeceasedAffiliationMaximalsRankScout Transformers: Rise of the Beasts Michelle Yeoh Unafraid to operate alone and prepared to fly without backup into the face of certain danger, Airazor was a brave, dignified warrior whose sharp eyesight and awesome ordnance is a steady comfort to her fellow Maximals on the ground. A vigilant protector of both her team and her allies, she was both elegant and distinguished, perhaps the most sophisticated Maximal there was. But don't let that fool you - she had a sense of humor so dry it could burn you just as bad her flames.

characters.name: Airwave TFP
characters.description: Airwavewas one of theAutobotshidden inCybertronafter the planet fell toDecepticonoccupation. The leader of a community of such Autobots, he was known for having poor relations with theDinobots, considering them dangerous monsters. However, Airwave proved to be the true monster, as his desperation to insure his own survival led him to drainEnergonfrom deadCybertroniansand even commit murder in order to take it from his victims. Eventually the Dinobots discovered his crimes, and working together with the citizens of his city brought him down. Airwave was one of many Autobots imprisoned by Shockwave. Although he made his escape in the chaos that followed the Dinobots' escape from the Decepticon's facility, what he saw of Grimlock and his men made a bad, bad first impression. As a consequence, he made it clear to Grimlock that his outpost of Last Spark neither desired nor would tolerate any interaction with the Dinobots. After his people started being killed by an unknown predator, however, he grudgingly agreed to Firestar's request to allow Sludge and Snarl to help investigate. After Sludge, Snarl and Firestar returned to Last Spark to discover that some of the bodies there had been drained of Energon before any attacks were even recorded, they realized the killer must have been someone already living in the town. Airwave, entering the crypt, scoffed at the whole idea...until Sludge suddenly realized the evidence they'd collected pointed at Airwave himself as the killer. Exposed, he struck down Firestar from behind and made his escape in jet mode, rallying the unsuspecting inhabitants of Last Spark to attack the Dinobots by falsely proclaiming them the killers. He then returned to the fight, firing indiscriminately into the crowd. Sludge was able to bring him down from the sky, but the fully-charged Airwave was more than a match for him even on the ground. Airwave declared to the battered Sludge that the planet was dying, that there was no escape, and that the only thing that mattered was who survived the longest. Just before he could deliver thecoup de grace, however, he was cut in half by Firestar.

characters.name: Akiba Prime
characters.description: Akiba Prime(アキバプライムAkiba Puraimu) is theAutobotCommander assigned to the district ofAkihabara. An idol back onCybertron, she's an accomplished commander whose balance between being strict and gentle has won the hearts of many a subordinate. Her signature weapon is two Electric Swords that let her freely control electronic circuits.

characters.name: Akiba Prime
characters.description: Akiba Prime(アキバプライムAkiba Puraimu) is theAutobotCommander assigned to the district ofAkihabara. An idol back onCybertron, she's an accomplished commander whose balance between being strict and gentle has won the hearts of many a subordinate. Her signature weapon is two Electric Swords that let her freely control electronic circuits.

characters.name: Al
characters.description: Alwas a sailor once. Nowadays, he just hangs around in burger joints. Al was a crewman on the shipMary Jane. When asea monsterdestroyed the ship, he was the only survivor. Some time later, he was sitting in a burger joint telling his tale toMiko,Jack, andRaf.

characters.name: Alchemist Prime
characters.description: Alchemist PrimeBasic InformationAlias(es)Macadam (Possibly)SpeciesCybertronianGenderMaleRankPrimeStatusUnknownAffiliationAutobotsOptimus Prime(student) Alchemist Primeis one of theThirteenand is the co-founder of the earlyCybertroniancivilization withAlpha Trion, while the other Primes separated across space and time after their great schism. He was among the Thirteen created by Primus to battle and defeatUnicronand witnessed the activation of theWell of Allsparks. According to Alpha Trion (Transformers: Exiles), after seeingCybertronset on the path to civilization, he departed in pursuit of theLiege Maximoin order to imprison him for his crimes. Though he never saw his brother again, Alpha Trion felt that he had been successful. However, another source (The Covenant of Primus) indicates that Maximo died on Cybertron, thus leaving Alchemist's fate an even greater mystery.

characters.name: Alchemist Prime
characters.description: Alchemist PrimeBasic InformationAlias(es)Macadam (Possibly)SpeciesCybertronianGenderMaleRankPrimeStatusUnknownAffiliationAutobotsOptimus Prime(student) Alchemist Primeis one of theThirteenand is the co-founder of the earlyCybertroniancivilization withAlpha Trion, while the other Primes separated across space and time after their great schism. He was among the Thirteen created by Primus to battle and defeatUnicronand witnessed the activation of theWell of Allsparks. According to Alpha Trion (Transformers: Exiles), after seeingCybertronset on the path to civilization, he departed in pursuit of theLiege Maximoin order to imprison him for his crimes. Though he never saw his brother again, Alpha Trion felt that he had been successful. However, another source (The Covenant of Primus) indicates that Maximo died on Cybertron, thus leaving Alchemist's fate an even greater mystery.

characters.name: Alex Malto (EarthSpark)
characters.description: Alex Malto (EarthSpark)Basic InformationReal NameAlex MaltoAlias(es)Dad (bySpeciesHumanGenderHumanStatusOnlineAffiliationAutobotsEnemiesDecepticonMandroidPhysical DescriptionEye ColorBrown Mandroid DoctorAlex Maltois a history professor and massive, massive fan ofBumblebee, possibly not in that order. As the father of the Malto family, he helps keep the peace by defusing tense situations with his always positive demeanor and tasty home cooking. His years spent studying to earn his PhD, combined with his pride in his Filipino heritage, make him a strong believer in the importance of passing down knowledge and traditions, and he's done his best to instill an appreciation for both in his children. He and his wife Dot have their work cut out for them raising not only Robby and Mo, but an expanding number ofTerrans, so it's just as well Alex really likes Transformers.
